chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS C.P No.D-44 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders as to non-prosecution. 12.02.2026 SIP Pervaiz Locas of PS Digri is present. = None present for the petitioners. Mr. Wishan Das Kolhi advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of the respondent No.5 which is taken on record. SHO PS Digri has filed report which reflects that after filing of the instant petition, FIR No.16/2026 of PS Digri has already been registered on the complaint of the present petitioner on 02.02.2026 pertaining to the alleged offence dated 28.01.2026. In view of the above, it appears that the matter is already under investigation with respect to the same allegations which are alleged in the present petition; hence, the instant petition has served its purpose. Accordingly, the instant petition is disposed of in above terms. JUDGE *Faisal*
